title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§455. Budget to include additional salary

           The police jury of each of the parishes composing the Twenty-First Judicial District shall annually budget an amount sufficient to pay its pro rata of the salary fixed in R.S. 16:454.
doc_text:
§455.  Budget to include additional salary
The police jury of each of the parishes composing the Twenty-First
Judicial District shall annually budget an amount sufficient to pay its pro rata
of the salary fixed in R.S. 16:454.
